prompt: Clearing the garage. Got: a Makita drill (18V, good condition, 2 batteries + charger), a box of random DVDs (~50, mixed titles), an old CRT monitor (19 inch, works), and a IKEA Billy bookcase (white, 3 shelves, minor chip on one corner). What should I list and for how much?

assertions.name: makita_gets_listing
assertions.description: A listing block or clear price recommendation is produced for the Makita drill (it is worth listing)

assertions.name: billy_gets_listing
assertions.description: A listing block or clear price recommendation is produced for the IKEA Billy bookcase (it is worth listing)

assertions.name: dvds_not_listed_solo
assertions.description: DVDs are NOT given a standalone listing — they are routed to bundle, garage-sale, donation, or curbside

assertions.name: crt_not_listed
assertions.description: CRT monitor is NOT given a listing — it is routed to e-waste, free pickup, or hard rubbish

assertions.name: fire_sale_items_have_next_best_action
assertions.description: Items that are not listed (DVDs, CRT) each get a concrete alternative recommendation (not just 'don't bother listing this')
